<?php
/* Template Name: Canvas */
?><!doctype html>
<html <?php language_attributes(); ?>>
<head>
<meta charset="<?php bloginfo( 'charset' ); ?>">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title><?php wp_title( '|', true, 'right' ); bloginfo( 'name' ); ?></title>
<?php wp_head(); ?>
</head>
<body>
<?php while ( have_posts() ) : the_post(); the_content(); endwhile; ?>
<?php wp_footer(); ?>
</body>
</html>

steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; foreach ( ['marketing','marketing-brand-guide','marketing-demo-hub'] as $slug ) { $p = get_page_by_path( $slug ); if ( $p ) { update_post_meta( $p->ID, '_wp_page_template', 'page-canvas.php' ); } }
